paper_notes: Canonical formal DOE paper with explicit sections and separated variable/result tables.

PREPARATION_METHOD.selection_intent: Frontload the canonical synthesis workflow that anchors formulation construction steps.

expected_sources.raw_text_excerpt: prepared using emulsion solvent evaporation... added drop wise... stirring... centrifuged... washed... redispersed

PREPARATION_METHOD.inclusion_notes: Must be placed early because it is the main procedural anchor.
PREPARATION_METHOD.exclusion_notes: Background or characterization sections should not compete with this role.

MATERIALS.selection_intent: Expose polymer, surfactant, drug, solvent and supplier context needed for formulation understanding.

expected_sources.raw_text_excerpt: PLGA... poloxamer 407... purchased from... HPLC grade acetone and water

MATERIALS.inclusion_notes: Should appear near the preparation block.
MATERIALS.exclusion_notes: Do not replace with downstream assay reagent lists.

EXPERIMENTAL_DESIGN.selection_intent: Frontload the explicit DOE design section with modeled factors and responses.

expected_sources.raw_text_excerpt: Box-Behnken design... independent variables... polynomial model... Design Expert

EXPERIMENTAL_DESIGN.inclusion_notes: This should be retained because it changes how the downstream tables and optimization result are interpreted.
EXPERIMENTAL_DESIGN.exclusion_notes: Should not be replaced by general discussion of model validity.

VARIABLE_TABLE.selection_intent: Frontload the factor space and variable levels.

expected_sources.raw_text_excerpt: variables and levels in Box-Behnken design

VARIABLE_TABLE.inclusion_notes: Must be included before or together with the formulation table.
VARIABLE_TABLE.exclusion_notes: Do not swap with result tables.

FORMULATION_TABLE.selection_intent: Provide run-wise formulation and response evidence.
FORMULATION_TABLE.inclusion_notes: This is the core run-wise evidence table for the DOE surface.
FORMULATION_TABLE.exclusion_notes: Avoid duplicate or polluted table variants.

OPTIMIZATION_RESULT.selection_intent: Show the final optimized condition and predicted-versus-experimental validation.

expected_sources.raw_text_excerpt: optimum formulation... predicted values... experimental validation... desirability factor

OPTIMIZATION_RESULT.inclusion_notes: Important because it links modeled design to selected formulation.
OPTIMIZATION_RESULT.exclusion_notes: Do not replace with generic discussion.

CONTEXT_FALLBACK.selection_intent: Retain limited supporting context only when it clarifies how the DOE setup connects to the optimized formulation and validation.

expected_sources.raw_text_excerpt: supporting interpretation of model fit, response trends, or validation around the optimized formulation

negative_signals: duplicate discussion of already selected primary evidence
CONTEXT_FALLBACK.inclusion_notes: Fallback context should remain secondary to the explicit DOE design, variable table, formulation table, and optimization result surfaces.
CONTEXT_FALLBACK.exclusion_notes: Do not use fallback to replace any missing primary DOE role.
CONTEXT_FALLBACK.notes: The primary DOE evidence is already structurally explicit, so fallback should remain narrow.
